reviews.review_description: i miss the game i wish it will come back
When I played the game and had fun with my firned in it, it was super fun, but they had to shut it down, the good memories on it was amazing
The game is broken I have been waiting a long while for the game to stand up. I had the game for long time and it doesn’t take this long.
I pad 5 dollar and it free now I worked hard for 5 dollar and it a bad game😡
Very well made. My youngest lives this. Can't wait for updates!!

reviews.review_title: Great, but could use more bricks
reviews.review_description: The only thing wrong with this game is there isn’t a ton of bricks, I mean there’s plenty, but it’s pretty lacking with circular pieces. That’s just about it though. Great game, and well worth the money.

I just feel that there needs to be more space/ free play with this game like we should be able to build not only on platforms but off them too
There should be more types of blocks as well

This game is really fun but it won’t let me download it anymore 

￼

reviews.review_title: Probably The BEST VR game right now.
reviews.review_description: If you like creativity, then get this. The community is phenomenal. It is in app lab right now, so its not at its best yet, but there are regular updates and the dev is very nice. (also glass blocks????)

I love this game I would play it almost every day. But recently it's been saying it's "out of date". And I don't know how to fix it. I don't see any update button and I tried restarting my oculus and uninstalling the game but nothing works. :/ Please someone tell me what to do! Update: It wont even load the servers at this point. Please fix.
Extremely bare bones at the moment, but it's coming along well!
It's fun to create but it needs a update need add more blocks and maybe a way to adjust your table size.
I keep having the exact same problem as Cosmo.690, but overall great game. Amazing gameplay and you can be as creative as you want.

reviews.review_title: Love the game but needs more blocks
reviews.review_description: I love the game and wanted it for awhile. When I finally got the game I was a little disappointed. While the game is full of creativity and fun, I feel their is room for more blocks. The games potential seems great and 10/10 would recommend but just needs more blocks.
Really relaxing, now I just want it to have more blocks
It’s a really fun game and the best part about it is that you can play with friends the tutorial is very fun and understanding and yes I really recommend playing if you have a VR headset
i built a castle and a lego store and none of my friends have it but the multiplayer mode still looks kind of cool i guess
Even if no mini figs, still goid

Final rating /10 -

The game is so much fun don’t get me wrong but I would really enjoy customizable mini figures and weapons for them. I can’t really make a Lego city in this game and I think the idea is good but other than that It’s an amazing game
